calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:32am and concluding at 9:45am.

Plaintiff 3023-3029 Clement Street, LLC is present in court represented by Kevin Greenquist.
Defendant Lauryn A. Pelton not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 3023-3029 Clement Street, LLc and against Defendant Lauryn A. Peltonb, as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to and awarded possession of the Premises at 3027 Clement Street, #1 San Francisco, CA 94121.

The court is not awarding any monetary damages.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Continued To Dec-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff 3023-3029 Clement Street, LLC is present in represented byt Kevin Greenquest.
Defendant Lauryn A. Pelton not appearing.

This department did not receive any courtesy copies on this matter. This matter is continued to December 24, 2025 at 9:00am to allow counsel an oppertunity to provide copies to this department for the Judge's review.
